recentTweets.text: So sad to hear about the passing of Union County Clerk Joanne Rajoppi, who served in public office for 53 years. My thoughts are with her family and loved ones. Her commitment to strengthening our democracy will be remembered by all who knew her https://t.co/9Cr3LJgWZ0

John Lewis never hesitated to speak truth to power. Six years after his passing, we honor his work in pushing our nation toward racial equity and serving as the conscience of the Congress. Let’s continue the work of Good Trouble in his honor.

Trump wasted all of our time tonight sowing seeds of doubt about our democratic institutions and laying the groundwork to challenge any election results he doesn't like. I didn’t see a president up there. I saw a man desperately worried about the midterm elections.

Federal agencies should serve Americans, not political agendas. Under Todd Blanche, DOJ is targeting Trump's political opponents and failing to hold ICE accountable for its heinous conduct. No senator should vote to promote someone so willing to cut corners and break protocols in

RT @PANYNJ: Air quality is expected to reach unhealthy levels today. 

Port Authority teams are distributing thousands of N95-style masks t…

Are you a student seeking to make change in your community? I designed my Congressional Youth Advisory Council to prepare young people to become our next generation of leaders. Apply by August 24 to learn about leadership, policy, and making a difference. https://t.co/wXKh5diViO
Join me Facebook Live at 2PM. 💜🩺

I've been in the room since the Senate Judiciary Committee hearing began this morning, watching Acting AG Blanche dodge questions and spew lies. One thing is clear: if he’s confirmed, he would keep using the DOJ to serve his own interests and protect his friends, not Americans. https://t.co/e8uG09tOCW

Let’s not forget who Todd Blanche is.

Just over a year ago at Delaney Hall: “We are arresting the mayor right now, per the deputy attorney general of the U.S. Anyone that gets in our way, I need you guys to give me a perimeter so I can cuff him.”

Today, that same deputy
Find more information here: https://t.co/K70wzhKzGS
https://t.co/B1XuRCiusf

A healthier New Jersey where everyone has the tools to be well is my goal. 

That’s why I’m inviting you to my virtual State of New Jersey Health webinar on diabetes awareness tomorrow at 2:00PM. We’re working to combat diabetes in NJ-10 with knowledge and policy.

If we’re serious about encouraging tech innovation, we must protect the small businesses and communities that bear the costs of these changes.

In @hsbcdems, I asked the head of innovation & strategy at @kaporcenter how small businesses can use AI to assist, not replace, workers. https://t.co/xrX9ppwIe9

It’s been less than a week since ICE killed someone in the street in Houston. These are not coincidences, this is a pattern. 

These killings are the result of cruel leadership with zero accountability. Investigate this tragedy and abolish ICE now.

We are getting to the root of health issues in New Jersey!

Join me for another State of New Jersey Health Facebook Live on Wednesday at 2PM to discuss diabetes awareness, prevention, and what we need to know to make NJ-10 a little bit healthier. https://t.co/LG74SCbAGG

This week in the 10th, Team LaMonica was…

📚Bringing Congress to your corner in Newark.
🎉Providing constituent services at the Heal the Block Party at Turner Park.
💵 Supporting families through federal grants. https://t.co/mmsQgahbqz
Team LaMonica was thrilled to bring Congress to your Corner at Military Park! We will keep showing up in your neighborhoods to get you the information and services you need. https://t.co/0EPWYnZ67A
Help us secure wins for you at Mobile Office Hours: https://t.co/yKEwud7AJa

Team LaMonica always shows up to secure wins for you! The IRS owed Jaclyn from West Orange money that she never received… until our team stepped in. 

We got to work and secured Jaclyn $1,595 in refunds. We loved helping her, and we can’t wait to help you at Mobile Office Hours! https://t.co/a6CNs7S9lk

Mark your calendars! We’ve changed hours for my Back to School Family Festival. I can’t wait to see you and your family at East Orange City Hall from 3:00PM-7:00PM on 7/30 to start the new school year! https://t.co/FZmdnjXzig
Come check us out at Congress on your Corner at Military Park in Newark! https://t.co/JF6yZNkq4E

💵Grant Alert! 💵

 In NJ-10, we’re prioritizing public safety and staying resilient through tough times.
I’m happy to announce a $1,538,650 grant to @readynj for disaster relief and emergency assistance programs! https://t.co/kVMNoNWmzF

For 35 years, Lorenzo Salgado Araujo woke up before dawn to support his family. This week, he never made it home because an ICE officer shot and killed him. 

We can't let DHS lie and hide from the truth. We must get answers for his family and we must abolish ICE.

July is National Parks and Recreation Month! Everyone deserves access to safe and welcoming outdoor spaces. That’s why I introduced the Parks to People Act to expand access to greenway trails in our neighborhoods. https://t.co/ZJBqgQkU1C

A good elected official listens, but there’s nothing wrong with holding their feet to the fire to make them hear you. Our community can’t afford to vote and get out of the game. 

At @essencefest, I talked with @nativelandpod about harnessing our power. https://t.co/2cLSshpQOp

Last year’s Back to School Festival was one for the books! 

And before books are opened in the classroom this school year, join us for this year’s Back to School Family Festival on July 30th!🎒 https://t.co/DFlZ4rcQmC

The baseless case against me is about this administration weaponizing the Department of Justice to do their personal bidding: targeting people that they don’t like.

I’m not backing down.

https://t.co/5wNZorF107

This week Team LaMonica was…

🎤 Discussing building our power at @essencefest.
🌳Opening Linden’s newest park. 
🇺🇸 Celebrating the 4th in Montclair! https://t.co/hfFUoY62Tp
Happy Independence Day, NJ-10! Today, we celebrate our nation’s ideals and recommit ourselves to building a stronger and more inclusive democracy for all. https://t.co/pMxfziK77L

I don’t know about you, but I don’t want to cover the cost of something I didn’t order.

That’s why I introduced the AI Data Center Site Selection Transparency Act, because residents should have a voice in what happens in their neighborhood. https://t.co/1rxPnb0LSM

No child should go hungry just because school is out. I introduced the Summer Meals REACH Act with @SenatorAndyKim to cut red tape, expand grab-and-go meal options, and help more communities provide free, healthy meals to kids all summer long. https://t.co/W412H9SavT

It’s been one year of Trump’s Big Ugly Bill and we’ve only seen the rich get richer and American families struggle. 

We have all felt life get harder since this bill. We need leaders who work to make life easier, not sell us out for their billionaire backers. https://t.co/vXjJJdhwcR

On the anniversary of the Civil Rights Act of 1964, we honor the activists and leaders who pushed our nation closer to the promise of equality. We will keep fighting in their names for our future. That’s what is on the line. https://t.co/JrRCWKUeJp

I spend lots of time with NJ-10 students, and I get it: seeing summer break end can be pretty sad, but it doesn’t have to be that way.

At my Back to School Family Festival, I want to bring in the new school year with fun, excitement, and resources to excel in the classroom. 🎒 https://t.co/bE6aXkxwlR
RT @Linden_PD: Advisory: Extreme Heat Watch issued for our area. Dangerous high temps through Sat. City cooling centers open. https://t.co/…

RT @CityofNewarkNJ: City of Newark will activate Code Red from July 1, 8AM to July 5, AM 
Temperatures are expected to reach the 90s, with…

RT @NJTransit_CA: 🔔 Extreme temperatures start today.

High heat puts extra strain on transit vehicles and infrastructure, so expect delays…

Nurul Amin Shah Alam died simply because ICE didn't care to release him in a safe environment or alert his family.

It’s wrong. I co-sponsored the Immigration Release Transparency Act so people are treated with humanity and relatives are alerted when ICE releases their loved one.

Being on the list of people who are willing to stand up to Trump’s cruelty means you’ll be on the list of people he will target.

The stakes in my case are high, but I’ll never back down. I will keep protecting New Jersey from this administration’s cruelty.

The Constitution is clear: Birthright citizenship is foundational to what it means to be an American and SCOTUS has just ruled that it will remain that way. 

Donald Trump isn’t a king and he can’t change the Constitution just because he is racist.
Learn more here: https://t.co/alzqVXEgtg

From stunning artwork to powerful poetry, NJ-10 is full of incredible talent.  I loved celebrating our young artists at this year’s Art Competition and can’t wait to read this year’s poetry submissions. Tomorrow is the last day to enter. https://t.co/T3HIOlUP9U

Trump knows we’re fed up with Republican policies. That’s why he’s frantically working to mess with our elections and your voice. 

Mail-in voting is safe. This is a much-needed win for voting rights, but we must keep working to stop Trump from restricting your voice.
With a new month on the horizon, we have plenty of opportunities to serve you at Mobile Office Hours! Stop by to get 1-on-1 time with our district team. https://t.co/rQAcGUcTif
Ready to make a difference? I’m looking for passionate NJ-10 college students and recent grads to join our team this Fall as interns in my D.C. and Newark offices. https://t.co/NAvsIEDauT

This week Team LaMonica was…

👩🏽‍⚖️Refusing to back down against Trump’s attacks.
📚Providing Mobile Office Hours in East Orange and Kenilworth. 
🏳️‍🌈Painting Jersey City crosswalks for Pride with Hudson Pride Center. https://t.co/AtDhgMvv89

$250,000 for smart traffic lights in @twpunionnj. You elected me to bring wins like this to NJ-10. I was excited to secure this funding in Congress for our community. It’s just the beginning.

https://t.co/YxJ0WGBGL9

On the anniversary of Obergefell v. Hodges, NJ-10 celebrates a historic victory for equality and honors those who made it possible. The fight for dignity, love, and equal protection under the law continues—and we’re not backing down. https://t.co/AgNdrjqxbw

The school year is barely over but the next one is already around the corner. I want to make sure you have the resources your student needs to succeed in the classroom! Mark your calendars for my Back to School Family Festival on July 30th. 🎒 https://t.co/8SpAq75uRF

The point of the Trump administration’s charges against me? Cruelty. Getting away with cruelty behind closed doors at ICE facilities, using the process to try to drag me through the mud and drown me in legal fees. It’s all part of the same agenda.

Small businesses are being squeezed by rising costs. The SBA needs to step up and defend hardworking people. 

In @hsbcdems, I asked an associate administrator from @sbagov if he understands how much businesses are struggling because of Trump’s reckless policies. https://t.co/ME4Zrnlw1B

Today’s decision is going to rip up communities across this country—communities just like mine in New Jersey. For Trump, that's the point. We can’t ignore who these TPS terminations target, the bigotry is so blatant, and a court allowing it doesn't erase that.
It’s absolutely scary to be facing 17 years in prison for doing my job, but that doesn’t mean I’m going to stop showing up to protect New Jersey.

RT @RepKamlagerDove: Americans want Congress to conduct oversight of the Trump Administration. Trump is trying to send my friend @RepLaMoni…
RT @HomelandDems: Oversight is not optional. The Trump Administration is trying to intimidate - and silence- those who demand accountabilit…
RT @RepMcClellan: As a coequal branch of government, Congress plays an important oversight role to ensure the executive branch meets its co…
RT @DDFund_: The Constitution protects lawmakers carrying out legitimate oversight. Today’s hearing in @RepLaMonica's case is a critical te…
RT @RepYvetteClarke: For exposing the cruelty at the center of their anti-immigrant crusade, the Trump Administration is trying to make an…
RT @RepYassAnsari: .@RepLaMonica is facing 17 years in prison for demanding answers from ICE and accountability from Trump’s administration…

assessment.posture: No captured Kurdistan social posture yet
assessment.summary: The local archive has not captured a tweet from this account that matches TOR Phi's Kurdistan Lens terms yet. Capture more timeline pages and targeted Kurdistan searches before drawing a social-media conclusion.
assessment.whatItWasLike: No Kurdistan, Kurds, KRG/IKBY, Erbil, Peshmerga, Northern Iraq, PKK/YPG, Iraq/Syria, Yazidi/Sinjar, or energy-linked tweet is present in the profile window yet.
